message:
fix(clippy): resolve all clippy warnings across frankenterm-core --all-targets

- Add `let _ =` for unused must-use return values (classify, evaluate,
  check_health, emit_trigger, check_health)
- Remove redundant `continue` in loop match arms (safe_channel.rs)
- Nest or-patterns: `Err(A) | Err(B)` → `Err(A | B)` (safe_channel.rs)
- Prefix unused struct field `event_ids` → `_event_ids` (proptest_replay_determinism.rs)
- Replace manual div_ceil with `.div_ceil()` (proptest_sharding.rs)
- Remove unused import `CompletionState` (proptest_completion_tracker_telemetry.rs)
- Fix dead assignment to `prev` (proptest_completion_tracker_telemetry.rs)
- Prefix unused variables `s1`, `s2` → `_s1`, `_s2` (proptest_wal_engine_telemetry.rs)
- Add missing semicolons in bench closures (byte_compression.rs)
- Rename dead helper `make_fast_warmup_watchdog` → `_make_fast_warmup_watchdog`

12 files across tests, benches, and src.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
